question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

graph.answer:
**Runtime Flow**
- Public bootstrap starts in [`Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php#L53). `AppFactory::create()` normalizes optional collaborators and returns a new `App`. `AppFactory::createFromContainer()` does the same thing, but pulls `ResponseFactoryInterface`, `CallableResolverInterface`, `RouteCollectorInterface`, `RouteResolverInterface`, and `MiddlewareDispatcherInterface` from the container when present.
- The main wiring happens in [`Slim/App.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L55). `App::__construct()` builds the route layer and middleware chain:
  - it calls the parent constructor with the response factory, callable resolver, container, and route collector
  - it creates the `RouteResolver`
  - it creates the `RouteRunner`
  - it either creates a new `MiddlewareDispatcher` with `RouteRunner` as the kernel, or seeds an injected dispatcher with that kernel
- The public runtime entrypoint is [`Slim/App.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L186). `App::run()` creates a request from globals if none is passed, calls `handle()`, then emits the response with `ResponseEmitter`.
- Request processing is in [`Slim/App.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php#L207). `App::handle()` delegates to `$this->middlewareDispatcher->handle($request)`, then applies the `HEAD` special case by swapping in an empty body.
- The middleware stack itself is thin in [`Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php#L50). Its `handle()` just forwards to the current tip of the stack. In the app bootstrap path, that tip is the `RouteRunner`.
- The terminal request handler is [`Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php#L37). `handle()` does the actual work:
  - if routing results are missing, it instantiates `RoutingMiddleware` and performs routing
  - if a route collector proxy exists, it sets the base path on the request
  - it reads the matched route from request attributes and calls `$route->run($request)`
- Route matching is split into two lower layers:
  - [`Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php#L31) normalizes the URI and calls the dispatcher
  - [`Slim/Routing/Dispatcher.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Dispatcher.php#L19) turns `RouteCollector` state into a FastRoute dispatcher, then returns `RoutingResults`
- If you keep drilling after the first behavior change, the next production files are [`Slim/Routing/Route.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Route.php#L40) and [`Slim/Middleware/RoutingMiddleware.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Middleware/RoutingMiddleware.php). `RouteRunner` hands off to those when it needs actual route invocation or routing fallback.

**Tests To Read Next**
- Start with [`tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php#L70). The most relevant cases are `testCreateAppWithAllImplementations()`, `testDetermineResponseFactoryReturnsDecoratedFactory()`, `testCreateAppWithContainerUsesContainerDependenciesWhenPresent()`, and `testCreateAppWithEmptyContainer()`.
- Then read [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L137) for dispatcher wiring, especially `testGetMiddlewareDispatcherGetsSeededAndReturnsInjectedInstance()`.
- For the public runtime entrypoint, read [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L1675) and [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L1728). Those cover `App::run()` with an explicit request and with globals.
- For middleware-chain behavior, read [`tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php#L161). The key case there is `testDeferredResolvedCallableWithContainerAndNonAdvancedCallableResolverUnableToResolveCallable()`, which exercises callable resolution and container fallback.
- For route execution, read [`tests/Routing/RouteRunnerTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteRunnerTest.php#L26). That test shows `RouteRunner` performing routing when the request has no routing results yet.
- For route matching behavior, read [`tests/Routing/FastRouteDispatcherTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/FastRouteDispatcherTest.php#L64) and [`tests/Routing/FastRouteDispatcherTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/FastRouteDispatcherTest.php#L82). Those cover not-found and method-not-allowed dispatch paths.
- If your change is route-middleware related, also read [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L786), [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L866), and [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php#L948) for middleware attached to routes and route groups.

If you want, I can turn this into a shorter “first 5 files to read” checklist tailored to either request handling, routing, or middleware behavior.
